result:
Wrote the spec. This was a single-file documentation task, so task tracking isn't needed.

**Path:** `docs/moboreels/real-mvp/spikes/auth-return-path-contract.md`

**Contents (12 sections):**
1. Goal — preserve `(showId, episode)`, drawer state, attribution, and intent through a fake auth detour
2. Preserved P0 invariants (watch-first, free-preview-first, per-drama lock, login-only-at-paid-action, same-episode return, attribution survival, `unlocked=1` as UX only)
3. Scope — allowed vs. hard-stops (no real OAuth/OTP/email/SMS, no prod secrets/backend/DB, no Pixel/CAPI, no licensed assets, no removal of mock disclaimers)
4. Fake auth route contract — `/fake-auth/start` → `/fake-auth/callback` → back to `/variant-b/watch/[showId]`; staging-only banner; no third-party calls; `AuthReturnState` token schema with no PII
5. Required query/state fields table (showId, episode, intent, drawer focus, attribution mirror of `ATTRIBUTION_KEYS`, nonce, issuedAt, auth_result, unlocked, fake_user)
6. Attribution preservation/filtering — locked to existing `ATTRIBUTION_KEYS` in `src/lib/query-params.ts`, 256-char cap, unknown keys dropped silently
7. No-login-before-free-preview — six explicit rules covering landing, free chain, episode sheet, reload, hand-edited URLs
8. Same-locked-episode return — byte-equal `showId`, numeric `episode`, drawer reopens with original focused CTA, no Home/Pass/catalog redirect, URL is sufficient to rehydrate
9. Success/cancel/failure matrix — 14 rows covering free chain, primary/secondary success, cancel, failure, nonce reuse, tampered/missing tokens, hand-edited `unlocked=1`, back navigation
10. Evidence checklist — route table, automated tests for rows 1–13, zero third-party calls, no PII, mock disclaimer visible, cross-references to Spikes 2 and 5
11. Stop conditions — exhaustive list inheriting from `spike-plan.md` §3
12. Go/no-go — **GO for documentation/spec only**, with four open follow-ups for the reviewer gate (nonce shape, query allow-list completeness post-Spike-3/5, Spike-2 enforcement of row 13, generic auth-surface copy until Q-CONTENT-1)

The spec stays inside the user-approved A1.3/A2.1/B4-direction/B5-execution/C1 envelope, references prd.md/spike-plan.md/decision-packet.md/gap-risk-register.md by section, and authorizes nothing beyond the spec itself.
